## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes locally (lint + build + test + OSS audit + npm audit)
- [ ] Tests and docs updated for any behavior change
- [ ] Preserves the trust boundary (no browser-session import; no logging of
      tokens/cookies/headers/prompts/responses; console writes stay CSRF-protected;
      no Platform internals)
- [ ] No new internal hostnames / infra topology / Platform-only vocabulary
